title: Tetrad Complex PAG Legend
subtitle: Legend tailored to tetrad_complex_pag.txt and the mixed-edge clinical workflow it illustrates.

items.label: Intervention pathway
items.description: Intervention feeds Adherence and Monitoring, which then influence Recovery and later Relapse.

items.label: Latent pressure
items.description: UnmeasuredRisk introduces partially oriented uncertainty into Biomarker and Symptoms.

items.label: Directed clinical effect
items.description: Used for effects like Intervention -> Adherence and Biomarker -> Recovery.

items.label: Undirected structural link
items.description: Support -- Adherence keeps one unresolved relationship in the graph.

items.label: Bidirected dependence
items.description: Monitoring <-> Relapse demonstrates a confounding-style pattern.

items.label: Partially oriented edge
items.description: Biomarker o-> Symptoms and UnmeasuredRisk o-> Biomarker show PAG uncertainty.

items.label: Unresolved on both ends
items.description: UnmeasuredRisk o-o Symptoms keeps both endpoint orientations open.

items.label: Weights / beta values
items.description: Use Edge labels -> Weight / beta to show signed effect-size values on the graph.

items.label: Confidence values
items.description: Use Edge labels -> Confidence and the threshold slider to filter weaker edges.

items.label: Target scope
items.description: Select Recovery or Relapse and switch scope to parents, children, ancestors, or descendants.
